title: Mosta, Mosta District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mosta, Mosta District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mosta is a city in Mosta District with a population of 20,000. A central Maltese town famous for the magnificent Mosta Rotunda, one of the largest unsupported domes in the world, which survived a WWII bomb strike.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
